text: A photograph showing the aftermath of a fire or explosion in a residential area. A two-story building on the left is heavily damaged, with exposed metal and charred walls. Adjacent to it, a single-story structure has suffered catastrophic structural failure, with the roof and upper walls completely destroyed, leaving exposed beams and debris. A man in a blue shirt stands in the foreground near the damaged building. A motorcycle is parked in front of the ruined structure. The scene is set under a bright blue sky.
label: Image
